name: bim-audit-log
description: Console-unique element change history viewer. Reads IfcOwnerHistory chain (who/when/application/change-type) and Totebox Archive YAML sidecar for field-level diffs (old value → new value per property). <ol reversed> newest-first; <details> diff tables per entry; paginated 20/page; Export CSV.
html:
History

2N1NMOV9z7$8Ww2DVqvxPB IfcWall
  1. 28 Apr 2026 14:23 Jennifer Woodfine · Revit 2024 (Autodesk) MODIFIED
    2 properties changed
    PropertyBeforeAfter
    ThermalTransmittance0.220.18
    FireRatingRW 45RW 60
  2. 15 Mar 2026 09:41 Peter Woodfine · ArchiCAD 27 (Graphisoft) ADDED

variants.name: ifc-only
variants.description: IfcOwnerHistory data only — no Totebox Archive sidecar available (new installations).

variants.name: with-sidecar
variants.description: IfcOwnerHistory + YAML sidecar diff data — <details> diff tables populated.

aria: <ol reversed> for reverse-chronological list. Each <li> with aria-label='Change on [date]: [change-type]'. <time datetime> for machine-readable timestamps. <details>/<summary> for diff tables. Change type badge: aria-label='Change type: [value]'.
pagination: 20 entries per page; Load earlier button appends older entries
service_dependency: Totebox Archive vault: vault/elements/{guid}.yaml (sidecar diffs) + vault/ifc/{model}.ifc (IfcOwnerHistory). Degrades gracefully to IFC-only when no sidecar exists.
